message:
feat(trace): add forward/backward compatibility for trace format [bd-zuwb]

Implement trace format compatibility handling:
- CompatReader: Reads traces with forward/backward compatibility
- CompatEvent: Represents known events or skipped unknown events
- CompatStats: Tracks compatibility issues during reading
- TraceMigration trait: Define migrations between schema versions
- TraceMigrator: Chain migrations across version gaps

Key features:
- Unknown event types are skipped with warnings (not errors)
- Newer schema versions emit warning but proceed (forward compat)
- Older versions within MIN_SUPPORTED range can be migrated
- Detailed statistics about skipped/migrated events
- on_skip callback for custom handling of unknown events

This enables newer runtimes to read traces from older versions
while gracefully handling unknown future event types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
